description_long: This hardware store is a single-story commercial building with a flat, gray roof and a combination of red brick and tan stone exterior walls. Large, black-framed windows line the front and side facades, allowing natural light to enter the interior. The building features a fenced-in outdoor area with a wooden gate and patio seating, suggesting a welcoming entrance or waiting area. The structure sits on a paved surface, with the main entrance likely located behind the fence on the front-facing side. The overall design is simple and functional, with clean lines and minimal decorative elements. The building appears robust and well-suited for urban environments, providing ample space for retail and storage.
description: A single-story hardware store with red brick and tan stone walls, large black-framed windows, a flat gray roof, and a fenced outdoor area with patio seating.
description_view_0: The front and left side of the hardware store are visible, showing large windows, a red brick facade, and a fenced outdoor area with a gate.
description_view_1: The right side of the building is shown, highlighting tan stone walls, additional windows, and the paved area surrounding the structure.
description_view_2: The rear and right side are visible, featuring more red brick, several windows, and the continuation of the wooden fence.
description_view_3: The view focuses on the fenced outdoor area and the front facade, with patio seating and the main entrance behind the fence.
attribute_storefront_layout: The storefront features large black-framed windows, a main entrance behind a wooden fence with a gate, and a paved area with patio seating. The exterior is organized with clear access points and a welcoming fenced section.
